name: fitness-application-root
description: Root management for AI Fitness Application

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "GATEWAY,USER,ACTIVITY,AI,FRONTEND" -c "green,magenta,cyan,white,red" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:activity" "npm run start:ai" "npm run start:frontend"
